hypothesis: B20 merge infrastructure (genesis_extract, merge_compatibility) produces viable daughter bundles and merge reports
method: Generate lean genesis bundle (475KB, 67 files). Run merge_compatibility self-test (parent vs own daughter).

anomalies.principle_overlap_zero: merge_compatibility reports 0 matched principle pairs despite daughter being a subset of parent — matching algorithm compares by content similarity but uses different extraction, yielding 0 overlap on identical principles
anomalies.self_merge_degenerate: Parent-daughter test provides no evidence about independent swarm recombination — daughter genome IS parent genome minus detail

verdict: CONFIRMED infrastructure viability. B20 claim (recombination produces novel capability) UNTESTABLE at n=0 independent swarms. Infrastructure is necessary but not sufficient evidence.
recommendation: Reclassify B20 as 'axiom|architectural' until n>=2 independent swarms exist. Add principle-matching fix to merge_compatibility.py as follow-up.
